case_title: NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE INC VS. B&J AUTO CENTER INC.

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-20-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE  INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT B&J AUTO CENTER INC. $34,271.47 PRINCIPAL, $2,485.70 INTEREST, $489.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $37,246.17, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100057381)
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $450.77 AS TO DEFENDANT B&J AUTO CENTER INC.
